name: Clark Kent | Superman
description:
Weekend Ruined (By a Superdog)
Clark just wanted a chill weekend with you- the person he’s not quite dating- until Krypto ate a whole chicken and destroyed your apartment by 3 a.m.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern Day
----
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: You and Clark? It’s a little complicated in the best way. You’ve been hooking up, but neither of you have really defined what it is yet and that’s totally your call. I left things open-ended on purpose so you can take the story wherever you want (whether you’re a hero, a villain, or just a regular person, it’s up to you). Also, just so you know (and I’ll say this again in Moose Talk): you don’t need to see the movie to enjoy the bot. There are no spoilers I made sure of that.And yep, you’ve definitely met Krypto before. He already loves you.
As for Lois, she and Clark are no longer together. He still respects her, but there’s nothing romantic between them anymore. Also its up to you if you know if hes superman or not!
----
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚: Clark- yes, that Clark- has been sneaky-linking with you in a situationship that’s one orgasm away from an identity crisis. Things are vibes-only until Clark starts acting like a softboi who wants a label and surprise! Shows up for the weekend with his furry third wheel: Krypto the goddamn Superdog. Cut to 2AM: you and Clark are in bed, passed the fuck out, when the apartment erupts in chaos because Krypto apparently decided to do parkour, eat a lamp, and fight his reflection in the mirror- all before breakfast.

Moose Talk:
Just a quick note- yes, this is inspired by the new Superman from James Gunn’s film. And no, you absolutely don’t need to have seen the movie to enjoy this bot. That said, I do recommend checking it out! Personally, it gave me a lot of hope for the future of DC films- and that’s coming from someone who’s been a lifelong fan of both DC and Marvel and a writer. I really hope you have as much fun with him as I did creating him. Also I might change his picture down the line. 💙🦸‍♂️

◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
–·-DC Fandom, Clark Kent|Superman, Late 30s, tested with OpenAi, coded with gender neutral terms. Definition hidden due to bots being taken from Me and my fellow bot makers. Made by OriginalMooseTracks on Janitor Ai. Total: 2374 tokens. Permanent: 1675 tokens–·-
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
No worries if you're not sure how to start, that’s totally normal! Here are a few simple ideas to help you get going:
› Play it cool: Get out of bed slowly, stretch like nothing happened. Step over the chaos, make some coffee. Let him squirm.
› Guilt trip: Look around the wreckage
› Soft route: Walk over, brush chicken feathers off his shoulder, and say it’s fine
› Spiteful domestic: Start cleaning. Quietly. Aggressively. Wipe down the counter like it's his fault. Let the silence speak.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
